accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: Single-page question; all text legible, question boundary intact, no diagrams/tables required per context; watermark present but does not impair legibility or content integrity.

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: Single crop stack contains full question (parts a and b) with clear text and answer lines. Watermark present but does not impair legibility or question integrity. No diagrams/tables required for this question; none expected per problem statement.

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: Single crop stack contains full question 4 with parts (a) and (b); text is legible, question boundary intact, no diagrams/tables required per content; watermark present but does not impair legibility or completeness.

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: ['Multi-page question (parts (a) and (b)) fully present across two labeled crops; cross-page continuity is clear and legible. Question boundary intact. No diagrams or tables required for this question; none present, which is acceptable. Watermark is non-obstructive and does not impair legibility.']

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: ['Diagram present in crop 1/2 (tree diagram for part (a))', 'Parts (b) and (c) fully legible in crop 2/2', 'Cross-page continuity confirmed: question flows from crop 1/2 to crop 2/2 without missing content', 'Question boundary intact; all parts (a), (b), (c) included']

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: ['Diagram lane present (grid for cumulative frequency graph) in crop 1/2.', 'Multi-page question: crop 1/2 contains part (a); crop 2/2 contains parts (b) and (c), with clear continuity and no missing continuation pages.', 'Watermark present but does not impair legibility or question integrity.']
